skins.name: skinsTV
skins.description: Anything Skins! A subreddit dedicated to E4’s critically acclaimed series ‘Skins’ (2007-2013). Skins follows the lives of teenagers in Bristol during their two years of sixth form and the many challenges they face. This is the place for discussions, theories, memes, and celebrating a show that continues to have a lasting impact.
